name: Camelot, Realm of Noble Knights and Noble Arms
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>と<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>城</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Giant Castle of Holy Knights and Holy Swords
desc: Once per turn, if a "Noble Knight" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 Equip Card you control instead. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card (until the next Standby Phase), and if you do, place 1 "Noble Knights of the Round Table" from your hand, Deck, or GY, face-up in your Field Zone, then you can Special Summon 1 "Artorigus" monster, or add to your hand 1 "Noble Arms" card, from your Deck or GY. You can only use this effect of "Camelot, Realm of Noble Knights and Noble Arms" once per turn.
eff: Once per turn, if a "Noble Knight" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 Equip Card you control instead. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card (until the next Standby Phase), and if you do, place 1 "Noble Knights of the Round Table" from your hand, Deck, or GY, face-up in your Field Zone, then you can Special Summon 1 "Artorigus" monster, or add to your hand 1 "Noble Arms" card, from your Deck or GY. You can only use this effect of "Camelot, Realm of Noble Knights and Noble Arms" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

mentions: Noble Knights of the Round Table
action: Returns itself to field while banished
Places cards from your hand in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Graveyard in your Field Zone
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
